name: Cold Orzo Salad with Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Raw orzo, cooked until tender and drained
10 ounces Frozen tiny peas, quickly cooked and drained
8 ounces Pitted black olives, thinly sliced
2 large Red bell peppers, seeds and membranes removed, finely chopped
3/4 pound Med-small shrimp, peeled, deveined and cooked, cut into thirds (remove a few whole for garnish)
1 medium Red onion, peeled and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, toss together the orzo, peas, olives, peppers, shrimp, onion, and parsley.
2. Pour the olive oil over the salad and mix well.
3. Add the vinegar, garlic, salt, and pepper; taste and adjust the seasonings as needed, adding more vinegar or oil sparingly if desired. Do not make the salad too moist.
4. Spoon the mixture into a mixing bowl large enough to hold the salad, packing it down slightly, cover, and chill thoroughly.
5. Unmold the salad onto a serving platter and garnish with cherry tomatoes and black olives. Split the reserved shrimp in half lengthwise and place them on top for decoration.
